name: Tailscale
description: Zero config VPN to access your Umbrel from anywhere
compose:
name: slashnode-tailscale
services:
  web:
    image: tailscale/tailscale:v1.98.3
    container_name: web
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    command: sh -c 'tailscale web --listen 0.0.0.0:8240 & exec tailscaled'
    cap_add:
      - NET_ADMIN
      - NET_RAW
    devices:
      - /dev/net/tun:/dev/net/tun
    network_mode: host
    volumes:
      - web_data:/var/lib
networks:
  slashnode:
    external: true
volumes:
  web_data:
    name: slashnode-tailscale_web_data
notes: Auto-converted from getumbrel/umbrel-apps (tailscale). Review before shipping. Upstream: https://tailscale.com. ⚠️ SECURITY: web: extra capabilities ["NET_ADMIN","NET_RAW"]; web: maps host devices ["/dev/net/tun:/dev/net/tun"]; web: host network mode — bypasses Caddy/Tor isolation, binds host interfaces directly.
